vulnerability.title: Ensure gnutls-utils is installed
vulnerability.description: The gnutls-utils package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install gnutls-utils
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: if ! rpm -q --quiet "gnutls-utils" ; then dnf install -y "gnutls-utils" fi

triage_decision.reason: The gnutls-utils package provides essential TLS utilities; without it, systems may lack up-to-date TLS support, increasing risk of TLS-related vulnerabilities.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: networking affected; Missing package leads to outdated TLS support; Potential vulnerability to TLS attacks
